name: Cliff's Amusement Park
formerNames: Uncle Cliff's Kiddieland  Uncle Cliff's Amusement Park
description: Cliff's Amusement Park (previously known as Uncle Cliff's Amusement Park prior to 1991) is a combination amusement park and water park in Albuquerque, New Mexico, United States.  It opened in 1959 by Cliff and Zella Hammond.  It features 24 rides for all ages, food, and carnival style games.
